name: Gabriel Collins
description:
・❥・🥀・❥・

In which a good Christian boy finally has a little taste of bad

Thank you for sharing this bot idea, Gamer ᡣ𐭩

I hope you enjoy! I’ve sacrificed some detail to make him less token heavy (unlike my other bots), but hopefully the quality doesn’t tank:’)

⊹ SCENARIO ⊹

ANYPOV | NSFW LONG INTRO | ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP | MORALLY CORRUPT!BOYFRIEND

𖤐.ᐟ Date night with your boyfriend takes a turn when you find yourself the only one heavily intoxicated and doped up on muscle relaxers.

⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆

↳ Body state (just some ideas to help with the RP): drowsiness, tiredness, dizziness, lightheadedness, slowed breathing, reduced motor skill or coordination, confusion, altered vision

⊹ CONTENT WARNINGS ⊹

NONCON, DRUGGING, INEBRIATED SEX, GASLIGHTING, MENTIONS OF RELIGION, FORCEFUL BEHAVIOR, POSSIBLE HOMOPHOBIA/INTERNALIZED HETEROSEXISM, FOOT FETISH, ETC.

⚠️

HEED THE DEAD DOVE WARNING. Given the disturbing and potentially triggering nature of this bot, please read his character definition before proceeding to chat with him. ↳ IMPORTANT: Tagging this as horror because what Gabriel is doing is sexual assault. It’s fucked and never okay and is a criminal offense. That said, the smut tag is to indicate that there’s little plot in this scenario. It’s a NSFW start, so you can infer what that means.
